_comment: Step 5.2 (04-program §5): mutation testing over the FINANCE CALCULATORS — the trust surface (§3.10b), scoped separately from the engine config (stryker.conf.json) so each domain's ratchet floor stays honest. Kill vehicles: the unit tier (calc suites) AND the characterization tier (the 5.1 calc grid + the 5.2 affordability verdict-engine grid). OPT-IN via `npm run test:mutation:finance`; never part of the default gate. MEASURED 2026-07-02: first baseline 63.55% (affordability.js 42.59% — the verdict engine was the gap); after the 5.2 fold-back grid 87.07% overall in 1m19s (642 mutants; affordability 89.91, calc-lisa 100, calc-savings/outlay 88, derive 81.9, calc-purchase 80.7). `break` is a RATCHET FLOOR just under that measurement — only ever raised. NOTE: incremental caching does NOT see kill-vehicle test changes under the command runner — re-measure with --force after strengthening tests. RE-MEASURED 2026-07-02 (5.12 exit): the 5.4-5.7 model additions dipped the scope to 85.58 (below the floor — the ratchet working as designed); exact-survivor killer tests restored it to 87.04 (657 mutants; affordability 89.97).

commandRunner.command: node tools/run-all-tests.mjs --tier unit && node tools/run-all-tests.mjs --tier characterization
